name: white-glove
description: ProviderSoft → HHA automation on AWS Lambda

scripts.build: npm run build -w @white-glove/shared && npm run build -w @white-glove/hha-client && npm run build -w @white-glove/processors && npm run build -w @white-glove/providersoft-bot && npm run build -w @white-glove/infra
scripts.test: npm run test -w @white-glove/shared && npm run test -w @white-glove/hha-client && npm run test -w @white-glove/processors && npm run test -w @white-glove/providersoft-bot
